announcements.subject:
Kati Patang Lifestyle Ltd - 531126 - Board Meeting Intimation for Raising Of Funds By By Way Of Making Calls On The
Outstanding Partly Paid-Up Equity Shares Of The Company
announcements.detail:
Kati Patang Lifestyle Ltdhas informed BSE that the meeting of the Board of Directors of the Company is scheduled on 26/03/2026 ,inter alia, to consider and approve Raising of Funds by by way of making calls on the
outstanding partly paid-up equity shares of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Kati Patang Lifestyle Ltd's Board will meet on March 26, 2026, to consider raising funds by making calls on partly paid-up shares, a key step in their capital-raising plans.
